title: The Pirate
writer: Albert Hackett, Frances Goodrich, S.N. Behrman
actors: Judy Garland, Gene Kelly, Walter Slezak
plot: A girl is engaged to the local rich man, but meanwhile she has dreams about the legendary pirate Macoco. A traveling singer falls in love with her and to impress her he poses as the pirate.
awards: Nominated for 1 Oscar. 2 wins & 2 nominations total
